# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Controller
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller

---
apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ControlPlane
metadata:
  name: linkerd-control-plane

---
apiVersion: service.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service-a
spec:
  selector:
    app: example-service-a
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: service.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server

spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      app: example-service-a
    namespace: default

---
apiVersion: service.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization

spec:
  rules:
  - selector:
      labelSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: example-service-a
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: TCP
  - selector:
      serviceAccount: example-sa
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ControlPlaneConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-control-plane-config

spec:
  server:
    serviceAccount:
      namespace: default
      name: example-sa
